note: Starter floors aligned to evals/LABELING_SOP.md. anchor_rate is 100% (any unanchored 'yes' fails). exclusion_recall gates the negative signals (e.g. ivf/rei); a gate with no labeled 'yes' examples in the set is skipped (n/a), not failed. After a real --live run, run --update-baseline and then relax each floor a few points below the observed value so normal model variance does not flap the gate.
